market_context: Markets facing headwinds from elevated oil prices and US-Iran conflict uncertainty, despite brief peace deal optimism. Tech stocks showing mixed premarket performance with AI names leading gains while broader indices decline on geopolitical concerns.

predictions.reasoning: QQQ broke key technical support at $600-607 and is showing bearish momentum in premarket trading down 0.8%. Geopolitical uncertainty and oil price volatility are pressuring tech-heavy indices despite individual AI stock strength.
Strong 8.19% premarket gain leading AI infrastructure names. Momentum in semiconductor sector and AI demand drivers support continued upward movement, though volatile market conditions add risk.
Broader market pressure from elevated oil prices and geopolitical uncertainty. Fed rate hike expectations rising with only 8% chance of cuts creates headwinds for risk assets.

Semiconductor strength continues with 7.26% premarket gain. AI enthusiasm and sector rotation into chip names provide support despite broader market weakness and elevated valuations creating vulnerability.
